parameters.query:
UPDATE message_threads
SET 
  reply_received = TRUE,
  reply_message_id = $1,
  reply_content = $2,
  reply_received_at = NOW(),
  status = 'replied'
WHERE id = $3;

INSERT INTO message_log (
  message_id,
  conversation_id,
  sender_phone,
  message_text,
  received_at,
  agent_id,
  user_id,
  processed,
  metadata
)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, TRUE, $8::jsonb)
ON CONFLICT (message_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  metadata = EXCLUDED.metadata,
  processed = TRUE;

options.queryReplacement:
={{ [
  $('Process Reply').item.json.replyMessageId,
  $('Process Reply').item.json.currentConversationId,
  $('Process Reply').item.json.replyFromPhone,
  $('Process Reply').item.json.replyContent,
  new Date().toISOString(),
  $('Process Reply').item.json.agentId,
  $('Process Reply').item.json.userId,
  JSON.stringify({
    is_reply: true,
    thread_id: $('Process Reply').item.json.threadId,
    original_message_id: $('Process Reply').item.json.originalMessageId
  })
] }}
